overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring a dusty frontier settlement with makeshift stone and metal buildings. The character walks through the settlement thoroughfare, passing several NPCs and ascending a stone staircase to an upper level under bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: frontier settlement main thoroughfare with wooden trading post

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the settlement past a wooden trading post structure on the left

notable_agents.action: standing still in the middle of the thoroughfare wearing light-colored clothing

entered.detail: two-story wooden structure with canvas awning and balcony on the left side of the path
tan canvas covering over the trading post entrance
large rock face forming the backdrop of the settlement
cluster of makeshift metal buildings with corrugated roofs

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a paved thoroughfare in a frontier settlement, passing a prominent wooden trading post with a canvas awning on the left. The environment features makeshift metal structures on the right and a large stone cliff face in the background. A stationary NPC stands in the path ahead as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: settlement plaza with industrial machinery and communication kiosk

events.description: character approaches the yellow communication kiosk and armored NPC near the base of the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward a stone staircase, passing industrial equipment

notable_agents.action: standing guard near a yellow communication kiosk wearing metallic armor

entered.detail: red illuminated sign on the building ahead
bright yellow communication terminal with glowing screen
wide stone staircase leading up to the upper settlement level

segments.scene_description: Having passed the first NPC, the character continues through the dusty plaza toward a stone staircase. A yellow communication kiosk appears on the right with an armored NPC standing beside it. The ground transitions from pavement to dirt as the character approaches the stairs, with industrial tanks and metal pipes visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase between settlement buildings leading to upper level

events.description: character begins ascending the stone staircase from the plaza level
character reaches the top of the stairs and approaches the third NPC

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs toward the upper settlement level, passing a third NPC at the top

notable_agents.action: standing at the top of the stairs facing downward toward the character

entered.detail: rough stone walls lining the left side of the staircase
metal pipe railing along the right edge of the stairs
large metal container blocking part of the path at the top of the stairs
red fabric awning over a structure at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow stone staircase flanked by rough stone walls and metal railings. The yellow kiosk and lower plaza fade from view behind. At the top of the stairs, a large dumpster sits in the center of the path and a third NPC stands waiting near a red canopy, marking the entrance to the upper settlement level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dusty frontier settlement that transitions from a paved thoroughfare to an elevated stone plaza. It begins by following the character past a wooden trading post with a canvas awning and makeshift metal structures, moving toward a stationary NPC against the backdrop of a massive stone cliff. As the character passes the NPC, the scene shifts into a dusty plaza where the pavement gives way to dirt, revealing a yellow communication kiosk and an armored guard beside industrial tanks and pipes. The camera then follows the character as they ascend a narrow stone staircase flanked by rough walls and metal railings, leaving the lower plaza behind. Finally, the movement concludes at the top of the stairs, passing a large dumpster toward a third NPC waiting under a red canopy at the entrance to the upper settlement level.
